chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-601 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.3645/2025 2. For orders on MA No.3646/2025 3. For hearing of Bail Application 16.7.2025 Mr. Rasool Bux Talani Domki, Advocate for the Applicants/Accused.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through instant bail application, applicants/accused Hamid Ali and Abdul Ghafoor both sons of Ali Muhammad Talani, seek protective bail in Crime No.32/2025, registered at Police Station Sohbatpur, District Sohbatpur (Balochistan), offence u/s 365-B, 34 PPC Prevention of Trafficking in Persons Act 2018. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicants/accused are innocent and have falsely been implicated by the complainant with malafide intention and ulterior motive; that there is an inordinate delay of about 06 days in lodging of FIR which has not been explained; that the PWs are relatives of the complainant, hence they are interested witnesses; that the applicants/ accused are ready to surrender before the Court concerned but apprehends their arrest and humiliation at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days is granted to applicants/accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.15000/- (Rupees Fifteen Thousands) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicants/accused surrender before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days is granted to applicants/accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.15000/- (Rupees Fifteen Thousands) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicants/accused surrender before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case the applicants/accused fail to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, their bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
